chunks.title: The Sabbath Year for the Land
chunks.reason: Establishes the command for the land to rest every seventh year.

chunks.title: The Jubilee Year and Land Sales
chunks.reason: Describes the counting of years to the fiftieth year and regulations for buying and selling land.

chunks.title: Promise of Blessing in the Jubilee
chunks.reason: Addresses the concern of food supply during the fallow years with a divine promise.

chunks.title: Redemption of Land and Houses
chunks.reason: Details the rules for redeeming land sold due to poverty and specific laws regarding city houses.

chunks.title: Treatment of a Poor Brother
chunks.reason: Instructs on sustaining a poor relative without usury and treating him as a hired worker.

chunks.title: Acquisition of Foreign Slaves
chunks.reason: Distinguishes between Israelite servants and permanent slaves acquired from surrounding nations.

chunks.title: Redemption of a Sold Brother
chunks.reason: Explains the process for redeeming an Israelite who sold himself to a foreigner and concludes with the theological basis.
